btn:
<button 
                       onClick={() => handleOpenModal(activePreview)} 
                       className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-white border-2 border-[#696cff] text-[#696cff] hover:bg-[#696cff]hover:border-[#696cff]py-2.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-widest transition-all"
                     >
                        <Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" /> Edit Laporan
                     </button>

<button type="submit" className="px-6 py-3 text-[12px] font-bold bg-[#696cff]text-white hover:bg-[#696cff]rounded-xl shadow-md shadow-[#696cff]/ transition-all tracking-wide flex items-center gap-2">
                   {editingItem ? <><CheckCircle2 className="w-4 h-4"/> SIMPAN PERUBAHAN</> : <><Plus className="w-4 h-4" /> BUAT LAPORAN</>}
                 </button>

<button onClick={() => handleOpenModal()} className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-[#696cff]text-white px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-[13px] tracking-wide hover:bg-[#696cff] transition-all shadow-md shadow-[#696cff]/">
           <Plus className="w-4 h-4" /> Buat Laporan Baru
        </button>

<button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleOpenModal(c); }} className="px-3 py-1.5 sm:px-4 sm:py-2 text-[12px] sm:text-[13px] font-semibold bg-[#03c3ec]/10 text-[#03c3ec] hover:bg-[#03c3ec] hover:text-white rounded-lg transition-all flex items-center gap-1.5 shadow-sm border-0 active:scale-95"><Edit2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Edit</button>

<button type="submit" className="w-full sm:w-auto px-6 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest bg-[#696cff]/10 text-[#696cff] hover:bg-[#696cff] hover:text-white hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:scale-95 rounded-xl transition-all border-0">{editingItem ? 'Simpan' : 'Upload'}</button>

<button onClick={() => handleOpenModal()} className="flex-1 sm:flex-none flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-[#696cff]text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-[#696cff] transition-all shadow-sm">
              <Plus className="w-4 h-4" /> Upload Dokumen
            </button>

<button onClick={() => handleOpenModal()} className="flex-1 sm:flex-none flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-[#696cff]text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-[#696cff] transition-all shadow-sm">
                <Plus className="w-4 h-4" /> Upload Dokumen
              </button>
<button onClick={() => handleOpenModal(doc)} className="p-1.5 text-slate-400 hover:text-[#696cff]hover:bg-[#696cff]rounded transition-all"><Edit2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /></button>

<button type="submit" className="w-full sm:w-auto px-6 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest bg-[#696cff]/10 text-[#696cff] hover:bg-[#696cff] hover:text-white hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:scale-95 rounded-xl transition-all border-0">{editingItem ? 'Simpan' : 'Tambah'}</button>

<button onClick={() => handleOpenModal()} className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-primary-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-semibold text-[13px] tracking-wide hover:bg-primary-700 transition-all shadow-[0_0.125rem_0.25rem_0_rgba(105,108,255,0.4)]">
              <Plus className="w-4 h-4" /> Tambah Area
            </button>

<button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleOpenModal(p); }} className="p-1.5 text-slate-400 hover:text-[#696cff]hover:bg-[#696cff]rounded transition-colors"><Edit2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /></button>

<button onClick={() => handleOpenModal(p)} className="px-3 py-1.5 sm:px-4 sm:py-2 text-[12px] sm:text-[13px] font-semibold bg-[#03c3ec]/10 text-[#03c3ec] hover:bg-[#03c3ec] hover:text-white rounded-lg transition-all flex items-center gap-1.5 shadow-sm border-0 active:scale-95">
                             <Edit2 className="w-3 h-3" /> Edit
                           </button>

<button type="submit" className="w-full sm:w-auto px-6 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest bg-[#696cff]/10 text-[#696cff] hover:bg-[#696cff] hover:text-white hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:scale-95 rounded-xl transition-all border-0">{editingItem ? 'Simpan' : 'Buat'}</button>

<button onClick={() => handleOpenModal(item)} className="px-3 py-1.5 sm:px-4 sm:py-2 text-[12px] sm:text-[13px] font-semibold bg-[#03c3ec]/10 text-[#03c3ec] hover:bg-[#03c3ec] hover:text-white rounded-lg transition-all flex items-center gap-1.5 shadow-sm border-0 active:scale-95"><Edit2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Edit</button>

<button type="button" onClick={handleAddAttendee} className="text-[10px] font-bold text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 flex items-center gap-1 uppercase tracking-widest bg-primary-50 px-2 py-1 rounded">
                       <Plus className="w-3 h-3" /> Tambah
                    </button>

<button type="submit" disabled={syncingCalendar} className="px-4 py-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest bg-primary-600 text-white hover:bg-primary-700 rounded-lg shadow-sm transition-colors disabled:opacity-50 flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                   {syncingCalendar && <RefreshCw className="w-3.5 h-3.5 animate-spin" />}
                   {editingItem ? 'Simpan' : 'Buat'}
                 </button>

<button onClick={() => handleOpenEditNotulen(viewNotulenItem)} className="px-4 py-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest bg-primary-600 text-white hover:bg-primary-700 rounded-lg shadow-sm transition-colors flex items-center gap-2">
                 <Edit2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Edit Notulen
              </button>
<button type="submit" className="px-4 py-2 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest bg-primary-600 text-white hover:bg-primary-700 rounded-lg shadow-sm transition-colors">Simpan Notulen</button>
<button onClick={() => handleOpenModal(mtg)} className="text-slate-400 hover:text-primary-600 p-1.5 hover:bg-primary-50 rounded transition-all"><Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" /></button>

<button onClick={() => handleOpenEditNotulen(mtg)} className={cn("flex-1 md:flex-none flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[12px] font-semibold transition-all shadow-sm", mtg.notulen ? "bg-primary-600 hover:bg-primary-700" : "bg-[#71dd37] hover:bg-[#66c732]")}>
                        <Edit2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> {mtg.notulen ? 'Edit' : 'Tulis'}
                      </button>

<button onClick={handleSave} className="w-full sm:w-auto flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-primary-600 text-white px-8 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-[13px] font-semibold tracking-wide hover:bg-primary-700 transition-all shadow-[0_0.125rem_0.25rem_0_rgba(105,108,255,0.4)]">
            <Save className="w-4 h-4" /> Simpan Perubahan Profil
          </button>

<button type="submit" className="w-full sm:w-auto px-6 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest bg-[#696cff]/10 text-[#696cff] hover:bg-[#696cff] hover:text-white hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:scale-95 rounded-xl transition-all border-0">{editingItem ? 'Simpan' : 'Tambah'}</button>

<button 
                             onClick={() => handleOpenModal(task)}
                             className="text-slate-300 hover:text-[#696cff]hover:bg-[#696cff]p-1 rounded transition-colors"
                          >
                            <Edit2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                          </button>

<button onClick={() => handleOpenModal(null, col.id)} className="w-full py-3 border border-dashed border-slate-300 rounded-lg text-slate-400 text-[13px] font-semibold hover:border-[#696cff]hover:text-[#696cff]bg-transparent hover:bg-[#696cff]30 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                    <Plus className="w-4 h-4" /> Tambah Task
                  </button>

<button 
          onClick={handleSaveSettings}
          disabled={isSaving}
          className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-primary-600 text-white px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg font-semibold text-[13px] tracking-wide hover:bg-primary-700 transition-all shadow-[0_0.125rem_0.25rem_0_rgba(105,108,255,0.4)] disabled:opacity-50"
        >
           <Save className="w-4 h-4" /> 
           {isSaving ? 'Menyimpan...' : 'Simpan Pengaturan'}
        </button>

<button type="submit" className="w-full sm:w-auto px-6 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest bg-[#696cff]/10 text-[#696cff] hover:bg-[#696cff] hover:text-white hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:scale-95 rounded-xl transition-all border-0">{editingItem ? 'Simpan Data' : 'Tambah Data'}</button>

<button onClick={() => handleOpenModal()} className="flex-1 sm:flex-none flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-[#696cff]text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-[#696cff] transition-all shadow-sm">
              <Plus className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Tambah Transmigran
            </button>

<button onClick={() => handleOpenModal(tr)} className="px-3 py-1.5 sm:px-4 sm:py-2 text-[12px] sm:text-[13px] font-semibold bg-[#03c3ec]/10 text-[#03c3ec] hover:bg-[#03c3ec] hover:text-white rounded-lg transition-all flex items-center gap-1.5 shadow-sm border-0 active:scale-95"><Edit2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Edit</button>

<button type="submit" className="w-full sm:w-auto px-6 py-2.5 text-[13px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest bg-[#696cff]/10 text-[#696cff] hover:bg-[#696cff] hover:text-white hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:scale-95 rounded-xl transition-all border-0">{editingItem ? 'Simpan' : 'Tambah'}</button>

<button onClick={() => handleOpenModal()} className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-primary-600 text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[13px] font-medium hover:bg-primary-700 transition-all shadow-[0_0.125rem_0.25rem_0_rgba(105,108,255,0.4)] w-full sm:w-auto shrink-0">
                        <UserPlus className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Tambah User
                      </button>

<button onClick={() => handleOpenModal(u)} className="px-3 py-1.5 sm:px-4 sm:py-2 text-[12px] sm:text-[13px] font-semibold bg-[#03c3ec]/10 text-[#03c3ec] hover:bg-[#03c3ec] hover:text-white rounded-lg transition-all flex items-center gap-1.5 shadow-sm border-0 active:scale-95"><Edit2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Edit</button>
